privileged_info_summary: Task operates on synthetic patient data (not real patient records). Patient 'Maria Santos' (DOB: 1978-06-22) is created fresh for each task run with demographic_no=10050. Initial status is 'AC' (Active), target status is 'IN' (Inactive). Login credentials are: oscardoc / oscar / PIN 1117. The task is part of Oscar EMR environment (open-osp Docker stack). All metadata claims about patient details, status codes, and credentials are verified against setup scripts and verifier logic.
